tasks.title: Centralize External Secrets Management
tasks.description: Install pass, generate GPG key, migrate all secrets from ~/.openclaw/.env, credentials/, n8n-stack/.env into encrypted store.

tasks.title: Mission Control Dashboard
tasks.description: Single-page dashboard: agent activity, system health, calendar, tasks

tasks.title: Watchdog auto-repair + Mission Control tab
tasks.description: Auto-repair engine with 5-level escalation, crash loop detection, JSON logging. New Watchdog tab in Mission Control dashboard.

tasks.title: Update n8n Code node calendar response mapping
tasks.description: Include full calendar event fields (start, end, id, status, htmlLink) in the Google Calendar webhook response

tasks.title: Layer 6: Access Control
tasks.description: Path guards (deny sensitive files), URL safety (block private IPs, DNS rebinding).

tasks.title: Integration: Ingestion Gate + Full Pipeline
tasks.description: Single entry point chaining all 6 layers. sanitize→scan→gate→redact→govern→access control.

tasks.title: Wire security-gate into OpenClaw pipeline
tasks.description: Hook security-gate.js into actual message processing. Inbound scanning on all untrusted input, outbound redaction before Telegram.

tasks.title: Enable LLM scanner + nightly security cron
tasks.description: Turn on frontier scanner, test with real payloads, set up nightly security review cron job.

tasks.title: Skill audit & refactor (progressive disclosure)
tasks.description: Audited all custom skills, deleted plant-doctor, refactored obsidian-vault/google/humanizer to lean SKILL.md + references/
